name: Hell PHYRE: Original Motion Comic
overview: Patricia Mendoza, aka Hellion Blade, returns after a 40-year blackout with mysterious powers. While stopping a robbery, she catches the attention of detective Red Fox, who begins investigating her supernatural abilities. Set in New York City 2036, Hell PHYRE follows a group of post-humans navigating conspiracy, identity, and survival in a city that doesn't know they exist.
